ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 排队待处理的笔记更改

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the provider AskMate uses for text chat and workflows.
ast.target: 选择AskMate用于文本聊天和工作流的提供商。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the text provider that improves image prompts before OpenAI gpt-image-2 generation. Image generation itself remains OpenAI-only.
ast.target: 选择用于在OpenAI gpt-image-2生成前优化图像提示的文本提供商。图像生成本身仍仅限于OpenAI。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Image generation still uses OpenAI gpt-image-2. Add an OpenAI key here if you use the Image button or /image command.
ast.target: 图像生成仍使用OpenAI gpt-image-2。如果您使用图像按钮或/image命令，请在此处添加OpenAI密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls OpenAI GPT-5.5 reasoning effort. Other providers ignore this setting.
ast.target: 控制OpenAI GPT-5.5的推理努力程度。其他提供商忽略此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how the composer sends messages. When Enter sends, use Shift+Enter to insert a newline.
ast.target: 选择编辑器发送消息的方式。当Enter发送时，使用Shift+Enter插入新行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used by Translate Preserve. Persian is the default. Use a language name such as Persian, German, Brazilian Portuguese, or فارسی.
ast.target: 由翻译保留使用。波斯语是默认语言。使用语言名称，如波斯语、德语、巴西葡萄牙语或فارسی。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether responses stay in the sidebar, become new notes, or apply to the captured Markdown note or selection.
ast.target: 选择响应是保留在侧边栏中、成为新笔记，还是应用到捕获的Markdown笔记或选区。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Compact keeps the current dense sidebar controls. Expanded gives the composer more spacing and a taller text box.
ast.target: 紧凑保持当前密集的侧边栏控件。展开为编辑器提供更多间距和更高的文本框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a small first-use tip card in the sidebar until dismissed.
ast.target: 在侧边栏中显示一个小型的首次使用提示卡片，直到被关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shows source, context size, provider, output mode, and privacy controls in the sidebar composer.
ast.target: 在侧边栏编辑器中显示来源、上下文大小、提供商、输出模式和隐私控制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls whether new requests include the captured note context by default. You can override this per request in the sidebar preview.
ast.target: 控制新请求是否默认包含捕获的笔记上下文。您可以在侧边栏预览中按请求覆盖此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls whether new requests include Markdown image references by default. You can override this per request.
ast.target: 控制新请求是否默认包含 Markdown 图片引用。您可以按请求覆盖此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how much note context AskMate sends by default. Expanded preserves the previous full-context behavior.
ast.target: 选择 AskMate 默认发送多少笔记上下文。“扩展”保留了之前的完整上下文行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Opt in to sending recent AskMate user and assistant turns as extra context for follow-up requests.
ast.target: 选择加入将最近的 AskMate 用户和助手对话轮次作为后续请求的额外上下文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional explicit multi-note context. Enter one Markdown path or wikilink per line. Sidebar preview can override this per request.
ast.target: 可选的显式多笔记上下文。每行输入一个 Markdown 路径或 wikilink。侧边栏预览可以按请求覆盖此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hard cap across additional notes before the normal request context budget is applied.
ast.target: 在应用常规请求上下文预算之前，对附加笔记的硬性上限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Explicit folder-level Markdown context. It is off by default and bounded by file and character limits.
ast.target: 显式的文件夹级 Markdown 上下文。默认关闭，并受文件和字符限制约束。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum files and characters read from the folder before the normal request context budget is applied.
ast.target: 在应用常规请求上下文预算之前，从文件夹读取的最大文件数和字符数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Extract readable text and embedded references from Excalidraw files as text context. This is not pixel-level visual analysis.
ast.target: 从 Excalidraw 文件中提取可读文本和嵌入引用作为文本上下文。这不是像素级的视觉分析。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include image paths, labels, extensions, file sizes, and reference lines as metadata context when image references are allowed. This does not send image pixels.
ast.target: 当允许图片引用时，将图片路径、标签、扩展名、文件大小和引用行作为元数据上下文包含。这不会发送图片像素。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ask text models to cite evidence sources like [S1], then show jump-to-source actions on cited replies.
ast.target: 要求文本模型引用证据来源，如 [S1]，然后在引用的回复上显示跳转到来源的操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stores successful AskMate turns per source note. Optionally include that history as context for future requests.
ast.target: 按源笔记存储成功的 AskMate 对话轮次。可选择将该历史记录作为未来请求的上下文包含。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pin a Markdown note as a persistent style guide context attachment.
ast.target: 将 Markdown 笔记固定为持久的风格指南上下文附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pin a Markdown note as a persistent glossary or terminology context attachment.
ast.target: 将 Markdown 笔记固定为持久的词汇表或术语上下文附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder for notes created by AskMate.
ast.target: AskMate 创建的笔记存放文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Markdown template for text result notes. Variables include {{title}}, {{sourceLink}}, {{providerName}}, {{model}}, {{request}}, and {{response}}.
ast.target: 文本结果笔记的 Markdown 模板。变量包括 {{title}}、{{sourceLink}}、{{providerName}}、{{model}}、{{request}} 和 {{response}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Markdown template for generated image notes. Variables include {{imageEmbed}}, {{imagePrompt}}, {{revisedPromptSection}}, and {{planningModel}}.
ast.target: 生成图片笔记的 Markdown 模板。变量包括 {{imageEmbed}}、{{imagePrompt}}、{{revisedPromptSection}} 和 {{planningModel}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder template for generated PNG files. Use {{resultFolder}}, {{date}}, {{noteTitle}}, or {{workflowName}}.
ast.target: 生成 PNG 文件的文件夹模板。使用 {{resultFolder}}、{{date}}、{{noteTitle}} 或 {{workflowName}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base file name template for generated PNG files. AskMate still adds a timestamp and resolves duplicates.
ast.target: 生成 PNG 文件的基础文件名模板。AskMate 仍会添加时间戳并解决重复问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto replaces captured selected text, otherwise appends to the captured note. Choose full-note replacement only for intentional whole-note rewrites.
ast.target: 自动替换捕获的选定文本，否则追加到捕获的笔记中。仅在有意进行整篇笔记重写时才选择“整篇笔记替换”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls how full-note Apply handles YAML frontmatter.
ast.target: 控制“整篇笔记应用”如何处理 YAML 前置元数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create result notes under an AskMate subfolder beside the source note, and optionally append backlinks to the source.
ast.target: 在源笔记旁边的 AskMate 子文件夹下创建结果笔记，并可选择将反向链接追加到源笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run one workflow separately for each Markdown note in this folder.
ast.target: 对此文件夹中的每个 Markdown 笔记单独运行一个工作流。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional text inserted into workflows through {{customInstructions}}.
ast.target: 通过 {{customInstructions}} 插入到工作流中的可选文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export custom workflows as JSON, or paste a preset JSON export and import it. Imports append workflows and do not overwrite existing ones.
ast.target: 将自定义工作流导出为 JSON，或粘贴预设 JSON 导出并导入。导入会追加工作流，不会覆盖现有工作流。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste an AskMate workflow preset export here before clicking Import pasted JSON.
ast.target: 在点击“导入粘贴的 JSON”之前，将 AskMate 工作流预设导出内容粘贴到此处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a sidebar workflow you can edit below.
ast.target: 创建一个您可以在下方编辑的侧边栏工作流。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lucide icon name, for example wand-2, lightbulb, or file-text.
ast.target: Lucide 图标名称，例如 wand-2、lightbulb 或 file-text。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use outcome-first instructions. AskMate will provide the current note or selection as context.
ast.target: 使用以结果为导向的指令。AskMate 将提供当前笔记或选区作为上下文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional per-workflow Markdown template. Leave empty to use the global result note template.
ast.target: 可选的每工作流 Markdown 模板。留空则使用全局结果笔记模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide this workflow from the sidebar without deleting it.
ast.target: 从侧边栏隐藏此工作流而不删除它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Warn or block requests before they use a large context or exceed daily or monthly token budgets.
ast.target: 在请求使用大量上下文或超出每日或每月令牌预算之前发出警告或阻止。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use 0 to disable a limit. Values are estimated before sending and recorded after completion.
ast.target: 使用 0 来禁用限制。值在发送前估算，并在完成后记录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Warn above the warning threshold. Hard limit always blocks. Use 0 to disable.
ast.target: 超过警告阈值时发出警告。硬性限制始终阻止。使用 0 来禁用。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: OpenAI 图片 API 密钥

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 笔记特定的 AskMate 历史记录

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Open a Markdown note or select text before sending.
ast.target: 请先打开一个 Markdown 笔记或选中文本再发送。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: AskMate image prompt planning failed. Falling back to the direct image prompt.
ast.target: AskMate 图像提示规划失败。正在回退到直接图像提示。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: AskMate could not save token usage statistics.
ast.target: AskMate 无法保存令牌使用统计信息。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Stop the current request before clearing chat.
ast.target: 清除聊天前请先停止当前请求。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Wait for the current AskMate request to finish, or stop it first.
ast.target: 请等待当前 AskMate 请求完成，或先停止它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AskMate is already working. Stop the current request before starting another.
ast.target: AskMate 正在工作中。请在开始另一个请求前先停止当前请求。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open a Markdown note or select text to add context.
ast.target: 请打开一个 Markdown 笔记或选中文本以添加上下文。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AskMate could not open the right sidebar.
ast.target: AskMate 无法打开右侧边栏。

ast.name: aria-label
ast.target: 文件夹上下文最大文件数

ast.name: ariaLabel
ast.target: 在侧边栏聊天中显示答案

ast.name: ariaLabel
ast.source: Create a new note from the answer

ast.name: ariaLabel
ast.source: Apply response to the captured note
ast.target: 将回复应用到捕获的笔记

ast.name: content
ast.source: Reply with OK to confirm this Azure OpenAI deployment works.
ast.target: 回复 OK 以确认此 Azure OpenAI 部署正常工作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fastest responses with no extra reasoning effort.
ast.target: 无额外推理开销，响应最快。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 适用于简单请求的轻量推理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Balanced default for everyday note work.
ast.target: 适用于日常笔记工作的平衡默认设置。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 适用于更困难任务的更多推理。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 适用于复杂工作的最大推理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: API keys, provider routing, model selection, and reasoning effort.
ast.target: API 密钥、提供商路由、模型选择和推理强度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Composer behavior, output defaults, preview, privacy, and context budget.
ast.target: 编辑器行为、输出默认值、预览、隐私和上下文预算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Thread history, extra notes, folders, drawings, images, evidence, style guides, and glossaries.
ast.target: 线程历史、额外笔记、文件夹、绘图、图片、证据、风格指南和术语表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Result notes, image output paths, Apply preview, frontmatter, placement, and review queue.
ast.target: 结果笔记、图像输出路径、应用预览、前置信息、放置和审阅队列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sidebar workflow organization, custom workflows, presets, and batch runs.
ast.target: 侧边栏工作流组织、自定义工作流、预设和批量运行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Token budgets, warnings, operation statistics, charts, and reset controls.
ast.target: 令牌预算、警告、操作统计、图表和重置控件。

ast.name: instructions
ast.target: OpenAI 图像 API 生成

ast.name: name
ast.target: 根据当前笔记生成图像

ast.name: text
ast.target: [大型差异已截断至更改区域]

ast.name: text
ast.source: No AskMate history for this note yet.
ast.target: 此笔记尚无 AskMate 历史记录。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Ask about the open note, use /image for generated images, choose quick workflows, or switch output to Note or Apply before sending.
ast.target: 询问当前打开的笔记，使用 /image 生成图像，选择快速工作流，或在发送前将输出切换为笔记或应用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Additional note paths, one per line
ast.target: 附加笔记路径，每行一个

ast.name: text
ast.target: OpenAI 已修订图像提示词。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Jump to a category or expand sections as needed.
ast.target: 跳转到某个类别或根据需要展开部分。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Favorite, hide, or reorder workflows in the sidebar. Built-in command palette workflows are not changed.
ast.target: 在侧边栏中收藏、隐藏或重新排序工作流。内置的命令面板工作流不会被更改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Custom workflows appear in the AskMate sidebar. Built-in workflows remain available from the command palette. Variables available in workflow prompts: {{noteTitle}}, {{sourcePath}}, {{contextSource}}, {{selectedText}}, {{currentDate}}, {{currentDateTime}}, and {{customInstructions}}.
ast.target: 自定义工作流会显示在 AskMate 侧边栏中。内置工作流仍可通过命令面板使用。工作流提示词中可用的变量：{{noteTitle}}、{{sourcePath}}、{{contextSource}}、{{selectedText}}、{{currentDate}}、{{currentDateTime}} 和 {{customInstructions}}。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tracks AskMate API operations by provider, including text responses, image prompt planning, and image generation. Images API rows may show zero tokens.
ast.target: 按提供商跟踪 AskMate API 操作，包括文本响应、图像提示词规划和图像生成。图像 API 行可能显示零个令牌。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No usage has been recorded yet. Ask a question or run a workflow to populate the charts.
ast.target: 尚未记录任何使用情况。请提问或运行工作流以填充图表。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Show the answer in this chat

ast.name: title
ast.source: Create a new note from the answer

ast.name: title
ast.source: Apply response, replaces selected text or appends to the captured note
ast.target: 应用响应，替换选定文本或追加到捕获的笔记

ast.name: warning
ast.target: 现有的 YAML 前置数据看起来格式错误。

ast.name: warning
ast.source: YAML frontmatter differs from the original note.
ast.target: YAML 前置数据与原始笔记不同。

ast.name: warning
ast.source: AskMate preserved the original no-frontmatter state and removed AI-proposed frontmatter.
ast.target: AskMate 保留了原始的无前置数据状态，并移除了 AI 提议的前置数据。
